examples: Eyewitnesses to other crimes have identified the wrong person in a police lineup or in photographs.
One player sure to be in the lineup is star midfielder Landon Donovan.
They were taken in a police van to the 60th Precinct station house for the lineup.
The company predicted its rekindles lineup would yield 11% to 17% profit growth through 2009.
The key is anyone who needs a guy in the middle of their lineup.
